training_status: EMS training 1-2x weekly, walking 1-2 hours daily

benefits.description: gained muscle during weight loss cycle

side_effects.description: appetite suppression can be too strong if dose is too high, making it difficult to consume sufficient protein

protocol_notes: Used both Retatrutide and Tirzepatide (not specified which was primary). Recommends keeping dose as low as possible for best results. Protocol included: EMS training 1-2x weekly (20 min sessions), 1-2 hours daily walking at elevated heart rate (>120 BPM), protein 60-90g daily via food and/or shakes with creatine, 2.5-3L water daily, vegetables for digestive health. Lost 20 kg fat with only 1 kg muscle loss.
